fields.name: FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related fixed asset.

fields.name: Insurance No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the insurance policy that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the insurance policy.

fields.name: Total Value Insured
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amounts you posted to each insurance policy for the fixed asset.
